title: tetragonolobus tetragonolobus
intro: Tetragonolobus tetragonolobus, also known as horse bean, is a perennial legume native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating digestive issues and as a natural remedy for constipation due to its high fiber content and ability to act as a natural laxative. The plant has been reported to exhibit various health benefits, including lowering cholesterol levels, managing blood sugar levels, and providing antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, Tetragonolobus tetragonolobus is often used to create teas, infusions, and capsules, which are used to support digestive health and overall well-being.
